title: Multiplayer FPS Demo
description:
This is a DemoThis is just a demo build showing the functionality you can learn with the video tutorial series : 

Об игреEver wanted to create your own Multiplayer FPS? Now you can!"But.. it's hard." No, it isn't, you just need motivation and some basic programming knowledge.This game is the Free-to-play Demo of what you can create by watching the Video Series "How to Create a Multiplayer FPS in Unity" available on Steam Video Platform!Features:• Multiplayer

• Multiple Weapons

• PvP

• PvE

• Score and Scoreboard

• Pickups

• Simple AI (Zombies)

This can all be learned from watching the video tutorial series (with source code available) Here:
description_short: Ever wanted to create your own Multiplayer FPS? Now you can!"But.. it's hard." No, it isn't, you just need motivation and some basic programming knowledge.This game is the Free-to-play Demo of what you can create by watching the Video Series "How to Create a Multiplayer FPS in Unity" available on Steam Video Platform!
